elements.name: intro
elements.html:
Code.org Professional Learning for Coaches

Well done, you've completed Code.org's professional development workshop for coaches!

Post-Workshop Survey

This survey asks questions about your experience today and your plans as a Code.org coach. Your feedback is crucial to ensuring we best serve educators through continual program improvement.

Privacy and Confidentiality

  • Your individual responses here are completely confidential.
  • Your identity will never be revealed publicly or used to tie any responses back to you personally.
  • We may share de-identified, aggregate data (representing all responses) publicly.
  • Your de-identified responses will be used by Code.org, our Regional Partners, and our facilitators for program improvement.

Your honesty and candor are appreciated.

Post-Workshop Survey

elements.name: nps_pd_coaches
elements.title: How likely are you to recommend this Code.org Coach Training to a colleague?

elements.title: What’s the primary reason for your score above?

elements.title: Do you feel clear on your responsibilities as part of Code.org's Coach Network?

elements.name: coaches_next_steps
elements.title: What are your next steps as a Code.org Coach?

choices.text: Support a teacher with curriculum selection
Share self-paced PL modules with teachers
Organize or lead a small group for collaborative learning

elements.name: barriers_pd_coaches
elements.title: Do you anticipate any barriers in taking your next steps as a Code.org Coach?

elements.title: How can Code.org better support you overcome this barrier as you take your next steps as a Code.org Coach?

elements.title: Which part of today’s training was MOST helpful to you and why?

elements.name: least_helpful_pd_coaches
elements.title: Which part of today’s training was LEAST helpful to you and why?

elements.name: other_feedback_pd_coaches
elements.title: What feedback or ideas do you have for improving this training experience for future coaches?

elements.name: permission_quote
elements.title: I give Code.org permission to quote my written feedback from today for use on social media, promotional materials, and other communications.

choices.text: Yes, I give permission to quote me and use my name.
Yes, I give permission to quote me, but I want to be anonymous.
No, I do not give permission to quote me.

elements.title: Would you be open to participate in a follow-up discussion to provide direct feedback about your experience in this professional learning workshop?

elements.title: Please enter the email address where we can contact you to gather additional feedback about your experience in this professional learning workshop.

elements.name: thank_you
elements.html:
Thank You!

Thanks from Code.org for your time, thoughts, and passion for teaching.
